name: io.github.smigolsmigol/llmkit
description: AI cost tracking: 14 tools for spend, budgets, Claude Code + Cursor + Cline costs, Notion sync

environmentVariables.name: LLMKIT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: LLMKit API key. Optional: local tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: LLMKIT_PROXY_URL
environmentVariables.description: LLMKit proxy URL (defaults to hosted service)

environmentVariables.name: NOTION_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Notion integration token for Notion sync tools

environmentVariables.name: NOTION_PAGE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Parent Notion page ID for sync
